differential_diagnoses: Legionella pneumophila pneumonia with rhabdomyolysis and AKI
Autoimmune myositis flare in the setting of infection
next_steps: Initiate emergent hemodialysis for severe AKI and metabolic derangements
Obtain Legionella PCR (sputum/BAL) and culture on BCYE medium
Send serum and urine for comprehensive toxicology screen (including heavy metals and adulterants in supplements)
Monitor serial creatine kinase and cardiac enzymes
Obtain repeat chest imaging if respiratory status continues to decline
Consider BAL if sputum cultures are nondiagnostic for atypical organisms
